title: Adjustments to draft financial statements
summary: 9706 — accruals, prepayments, depreciation, irrecoverable debts, and inventory.
learningObjectives: Provide for irrecoverable debts and allowances.
Value closing inventory and correct errors.

simpleExplanation.title: Fine-tuning the draft accounts
simpleExplanation.summary: Year-end adjustments match costs and income to the correct period — accruals, prepayments, depreciation, and bad debts before final statements.
steps: Accrual — expense owed, not yet paid.
Irrecoverable debts — write off and allowance.

sections.content: **Adjustments** (1.5.1) — list **each adjustment** with journal before statements.
